value: Fix: RN 0.76 + react-native-screens needs scripts/fix-rn-screens-codegen.js in postinstall, newArchEnabled:false in Podfile.properties.json, and react-native-screens@4.24.0. Guardrail: CodegenTypes as CT is Flow-only and breaks TS/native build.

Promotion rule: keep knowledge in bd remember by default. Promote to wiki only when it needs structure beyond prime-memory: longer than a few lines, needs examples/commands/file paths, links multiple decisions together, or should be read like durable project docs by humans and agents.

Rule: Expo Router white screen fix = export class ErrorBoundary from app/_layout.tsx and keep ThemeProvider wrapping the tree. Guardrail: without ErrorBoundary, JS crashes can appear as a silent white screen.

Convention: keep bd remember short and prime-friendly. Use one concept per memory with a stable key, start with one label only: Rule, Fix, Baseline, or Guardrail. Prefer 1-3 sentences, include only the must-remember cause/effect or sequence, avoid long examples unless they are required to prevent breakage, and update an existing key instead of creating near-duplicate memories.

Baseline: Mobilut wedge = trusted offline LUT workflow. Phase 1 = Home + Editor + Settings with preview/export parity, draft hydrate/resume, Crop/Adjust/LUT/Border-Frame, 50-step coalesced history, in-editor JPEG/PNG export, action-first Home, Theme hidden, English-only but i18n-ready. Phase 2 = Artistic Look + Smart Filter + Pro Clarity. Phase 3 = Batch + ads + Blend; batch picker = Recent + Albums, max 20.

Key naming rule: prefer lowercase kebab-case and anchor keys to the thing being remembered, not the date or session. Good keys are stable and searchable, for example editor-export-flow or bd-remember-convention. If the idea evolves, overwrite the same key in place.

Guardrail: render truth before chrome. Sequence = preview/export parity -> draft/session hydration -> Home/Editor shell. Batch + Home ads stay in Phase 3. Keep renderer-backed photo components outside src/ui/media.
